existing_features.title: Change the default view in App.tsx from 'hub' to 'landing', so that when a user first opens the app they land on the LandingView. After the user authenticates or chooses to proceed, they should be navigated to the HubView as currently implemented. All other view transitions and functionality must remain unchanged.

In HubTopBar, wire the profile icon button so that clicking it calls a navigation callback that sets the top-level view to 'profile' in App.tsx, rendering the ProfileView. When the user closes or exits the ProfileView, they should be returned to the HubView.

Update ProfileView to include a 'User Settings' form with input fields for Full Name and Telegram Handle (e.g., @username). The form must allow the user to save/update these values. The form should be visible both during initial profile creation and when revisiting the profile page. On submit, call the backend to persist the data and show a success notification.

Update the useProfile hook (and any related hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useProfile.ts) to support reading and writing the new fullName and telegramHandle fields when calling backend profile create/update mutations.

new_feature_requests.summary: In the title/hero section of the landing page, replace the existing subtitle or descriptive text 'Deliver groceries to my home' with 'Make database notes on behalf of me'.
Ensure the user lands on the landing page first, then navigates to the hub page. Keep all other functionality the same.
Allow the user to navigate to their profile when they click on the profile icon.

Update the Profile Page to include a 'User Settings' form with input fields for Full Name and Telegram Handle (e.g., @username). When the user clicks the profile icon, allow them to enter their name and email to create a profile, and include these fields when they create their account.

Update the backend user profile data model to include 'fullName' (Text) and 'telegramHandle' (Text) fields in addition to any existing profile fields. Expose backend endpoints to create and update a user profile with these fields.

Diagnose and fix the build/deployment error that occurred in the last deployment attempt. Review all backend Motoko code in backend/main.mo and all frontend TypeScript/React files for compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or any other issues that would cause a build failure, and correct them.

projectName: Update hero title text in landing page
